Imports

../core, ../indicators, base

Types

MFIStrategy = ref object of Strategy
  period*: int
  oversold*: float64
  overbought*: float64
  mfiIndicator*: MFI
  lastSignal*: Position
Money Flow Index strategy Volume-weighted momentum indicator for overbought/oversold conditions

Procs

proc newMFIStrategy(period: int = 14; oversold: float64 = 20.0;
                    overbought: float64 = 80.0; symbol: string = ""): MFIStrategy {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Create a new Money Flow Index strategy

Args: period: MFI period (default 14) oversold: Oversold threshold for buy signals (default 20) overbought: Overbought threshold for sell signals (default 80) symbol: Symbol to trade (optional)

Returns: New MFI strategy instance

Methods

method analyze(s: MFIStrategy; data: seq[OHLCV]): seq[Signal] {.
    ...raises: [StrategyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
DEPRECATED: Use onBar() for streaming mode instead. 
method onBar(s: MFIStrategy; bar: OHLCV): Signal {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Process single bar using streaming MFI
